completedSteps.summary: Classified golutra as a single-repo Tauri desktop app with Vue frontend and Rust backend.
Inventoried README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, legal docs, package manifests, Tauri config and source tree.
Extracted frontend, backend, IPC, storage, terminal, chat, notification and settings architecture.
Generated documentation and parity checklist for future modernization/rebuild planning.

openRisks: External golutra-mcp repository was not scanned.
Runtime behavior was inferred from source; no Tauri desktop app was launched during this documentation pass.
Registry latest versions were checked with npm/cargo, but official migration guides must be reviewed before implementation.
